purpose: Study-backed extension registry for Yeeflow control property paths that are not yet present in the product catalog.
baseline: Product catalog paths remain authoritative. Extension entries require explicit evidence before strong UI fidelity claims.

patterns.patternName: Radio filter dropdown visual fidelity, fixed 180px
patterns.evidenceSummary: Derived from redacted/manual Marketing Event Event Portfolio region filter evidence for event_portfolio_region_filter. This is an extension-layer visual usage pattern, not a product-catalog replacement.
patterns.proofBoundary: Validates declared/redacted control metadata only. It does not prove pixel-perfect rendering or parse screenshots.
patterns.notes: Use for high-fidelity generated Region-style dropdown filters when the product catalog control path exists but the exact visual composition requires export-backed styling.

patterns.patternName: Relative period dropdown visual fidelity, fixed 180px
patterns.evidenceSummary: Derived from redacted/manual Marketing Event Event Portfolio period filter evidence for event_portfolio_period_filter. This is an extension-layer visual usage pattern, not a product-catalog replacement.
patterns.proofBoundary: Validates declared/redacted control metadata only. It does not prove pixel-perfect rendering or parse screenshots.
patterns.notes: Relative period filters must declare the bound field and nonempty choice-options before claiming the dropdown visual-fidelity pattern.

patterns.evidenceSummary: Derived from redacted/manual Marketing Event Event Portfolio native filter icon evidence for event_portfolio_filter_icon_native.
patterns.proofBoundary: Validates declared/redacted control metadata only. It does not prove pixel-perfect rendering or parse screenshots.
patterns.notes: Use a real Yeeflow icon control for filter affordances; do not use heading/text glyphs as visual substitutes.

patterns.evidenceSummary: Derived from redacted Marketing Event Event Portfolio filter/action row hierarchy evidence. The parent row owns full-width layout only.
patterns.proofBoundary: Validates declared/redacted control metadata and decoded Resource attr shapes only. It does not prove pixel-perfect rendering or parse screenshots.
patterns.notes: Use this pattern for the outer Event Portfolio-style toolbar row. Do not apply inline widthtype to the parent row.

patterns.evidenceSummary: Derived from redacted Marketing Event filter group hierarchy evidence. The second-layer filter group is inline and left-justified.
patterns.proofBoundary: Validates declared/redacted control metadata and decoded Resource attr shapes only.
patterns.notes: Use this pattern for the left filter-controls group inside a full-width toolbar row.

patterns.evidenceSummary: Derived from redacted Marketing Event action group hierarchy evidence. The second-layer action group is inline and right-justified.
patterns.proofBoundary: Validates declared/redacted control metadata and decoded Resource attr shapes only.
patterns.notes: Use this pattern for the right action-controls group inside a full-width toolbar row.

patterns.evidenceSummary: Derived from redacted Marketing Event filter wrapper evidence. Filter wrappers provide hierarchy only and do not own fixed filter width.
patterns.proofBoundary: Validates declared/redacted control metadata and decoded Resource attr shapes only.
patterns.notes: Use wrapper containers for hierarchy, not to fake Data Filter width. Fixed 180px width belongs to the Data Filter control.

patterns.patternName: Data Filter owns fixed 180px dropdown width
patterns.evidenceSummary: Derived from redacted Marketing Event Data Filter evidence showing fixed 180px sizing belongs to the Data Filter control Resource attrs, not the wrapper container.
patterns.proofBoundary: Validates declared/redacted control metadata and decoded Resource attr shapes only.
patterns.notes: Status and Event Type filters should not retain legacy 120px or 140px wrapper widths under the high-fidelity 180px dropdown pattern.

patterns.evidenceSummary: Manual designer evidence shows nv_label controls the Yeeflow designer Navigator-visible control name. id is internal/stable, while label/name alone are not sufficient.

optionalProperties.id: stable internal generator or patch identifier
optionalProperties.label: human-facing descriptive label
optionalProperties.name: human-facing descriptive name

patterns.proofBoundary: Validates declared/redacted control metadata and decoded Resource attr shapes only.
patterns.notes: Important generated structural controls should use semantic stable nv_label values such as event_portfolio_filter_group.

patterns.evidenceSummary: Derived from redacted Yeeflow designer/export evidence showing non-Container runtime-effective width mode is stored under attrs.common.positioning rather than Container attrs.style.

forbiddenProperties.attrs.style.widthtype: container-only width mode for runtime-effective layout
forbiddenProperties.attrs.style.width: container-only fixed width when common.positioning is absent

patterns.proofBoundary: Validates declared/redacted control metadata only. It does not prove pixel-perfect rendering or parse screenshots.
patterns.notes: Container remains a special layout control; do not apply Container width rules to Data Filter, Icon, Heading, Summary, Collection, or other non-Container controls.

patterns.evidenceSummary: Derived from redacted designer/export evidence for runtime-effective custom width on non-Container controls.

optionalProperties.attrs.common.sizing: may provide min/max constraints but does not replace positioning width mode

patterns.notes: Use this when a non-Container control claims custom runtime width.

patterns.evidenceSummary: Derived from redacted designer/export evidence showing non-Container Advanced-tab spacing is stored under attrs.common.margin and attrs.common.padding.
patterns.notes: Do not use Container attrs.style spacing as proof of non-Container Advanced-tab spacing.

patterns.patternName: Non-Container Advanced-tab normal/hover border and shadow
patterns.evidenceSummary: Derived from redacted designer/export evidence showing border, radius, hover style, and shadow live under attrs.common.border for non-Container controls.
patterns.notes: Hover shadow must be checked under attrs.common.border.hover, not inferred from screenshots.

patterns.evidenceSummary: Derived from redacted designer/export evidence showing classic background color for non-Container controls under attrs.common.background.normal.
patterns.notes: Classic background color is an Advanced-tab common property for non-Container controls.

patterns.evidenceSummary: Derived from redacted designer/export evidence showing non-Container background images under attrs.common.background.normal.classic.image.
patterns.notes: Do not commit raw image assets as evidence for this pattern.

patterns.evidenceSummary: Derived from redacted designer/export evidence showing designer-supported gradients as two-color common background metadata.
patterns.notes: More complex gradient/background styling requires explicit custom CSS evidence before generation.

patterns.patternName: Data Filter dropdown runtime-effective custom 180px width
patterns.evidenceSummary: Derived from redacted Marketing Event Data Filter evidence showing the runtime-effective fixed dropdown width is the non-Container Advanced-tab custom width under attrs.common.positioning.
patterns.proofBoundary: Validates declared/redacted control metadata and decoded Resource attr shapes only.
patterns.notes: attrs.style width can appear in normalized study specs, but it is not sufficient runtime-effective width proof for Data Filter dropdowns.

evidence: redacted export/runtime artifact path or study reference
exampleEntryShape.notes: Example only. Do not treat as an active extension.
